abort.already_in_progress: Configuration flow is already in progress
abort.no_devices_found_in_account: No devices present in your account
abort.bluetooth_and_account_mismatch: Bluetooth device not found in your account
abort.api_limit_exceeded: API rate limit has been exceeded. Please try again later.

error.login_failed: Login failed. Check your account email and password, then try again.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Mammotion cloud. Check your credentials and network, then try again.
error.no_account_no_ble: No account details entered and no Bluetooth device found. Enter your Mammotion account credentials, or set up a Bluetooth device.

data.use_wifi: Use Wi-fi (un-tick and submit to use Bluetooth)

wifi.title: Connect to Wi-Fi
wifi.description: Enter your Mammotion account email or id and password

data.title: Update Configuration
data.prefer_ble_over_wifi: Prefer Bluetooth over Wi-Fi when available
data.full_map_fetch_enabled: Enable full map fetching (cloud) — when off, only area names are fetched

cancel_job.name: Cancel current task
cancel_job.description: Stops the mower and clears the current task.

start_mow.name: Start mowing
start_mow.description: Starts the mowing operation with custom settings.

collect_grass_frequency.name: Grass collection frequency
collect_grass_frequency.description: Frequency to collect grass (in meters squared). (Yuka)

border_mode.name: Mow order
border_mode.description: Mowing path order (Perimeter first or grid first).

channel_mode.name: Cutting path mode
channel_mode.description: Cutting path (zigzag, chessboard, adaptive zigzag, or perimeter only).

channel_width.name: Path width
channel_width.description: Width of the mowing path (in cm).

toward_included_angle.name: Crossing angle
toward_included_angle.description: When selecting grid change the second angle (default is 90 degrees).

mowing_laps.name: Perimeter mowing laps
mowing_laps.description: Number of laps around the mowing area perimeter.

obstacle_laps.name: No-go zone mowing laps
obstacle_laps.description: Number of laps around No-go zones.

areas.name: Area selection
areas.description: List of areas to mow (represented as integers).

plan_only.name: Plan only
plan_only.description: Generate the mowing plan without starting the job.

set_blade_warning_time.name: Set blade warning time
set_blade_warning_time.description: Set the blade replacement warning time in hours.

hours.name: Hours
hours.description: Warning threshold in hours before blade replacement is recommended.

reset_blade_time.name: Reset blade time
reset_blade_time.description: Reset the blade usage time counter.

get_map_data.name: Get map data
get_map_data.description: Returns the raw map data (areas, SVG tiles, area names) for use with the SVG map card.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion entity belonging to the device.

svg_add.name: Add SVG tile
svg_add.description: Send a new SVG tile to the device map. Returns the device-assigned hash.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion entity belonging to the device.

area_hash.name: Area hash
area_hash.description: Hash of the parent mowing area.

svg_data.name: SVG data
svg_data.description: Raw SVG markup to display on the map.

svg_file_name.name: Filename
svg_file_name.description: Filename stored on the device (default: pattern.svg).

rotate.name: Rotation
rotate.description: Rotation in radians (CCW-positive in device ENU frame).

base_width_m.name: Width (m)
base_width_m.description: Physical width of one tile unit in metres (2.5 for Luba 1/Yuka, 4.0 for Luba 2).

base_height_m.name: Height (m)
base_height_m.description: Physical height of one tile unit in metres.

x_move.name: X position
x_move.description: X coordinate override (metres). Defaults to area centroid.

y_move.name: Y position
y_move.description: Y coordinate override (metres). Defaults to area centroid.

svg_update.name: Update SVG tile
svg_update.description: Replace an existing SVG tile on the device map. Use the device_hash returned by svg_add.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion entity belonging to the device.

device_hash.name: Device hash
device_hash.description: Hash assigned by the device when the tile was first added.

area_hash.name: Area hash
area_hash.description: Hash of the parent mowing area.

base_width_m.name: Width (m)
base_width_m.description: Physical width of one tile unit in metres.

base_height_m.name: Height (m)
base_height_m.description: Physical height of one tile unit in metres.

svg_delete.name: Delete SVG tile
svg_delete.description: Remove an SVG tile from the device map by its device-assigned hash.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any Mammotion entity belonging to the device.

device_hash.name: Device hash
device_hash.description: Hash assigned by the device when the tile was added.

area_hash.name: Area hash
area_hash.description: Hash of the parent mowing area.

rename_task.name: Rename task
rename_task.description: Rename an existing schedule (mower or pool cleaner). Target the task button entity for the schedule you want to change.

name.name: New name
name.description: New display name for the task.

set_task_enabled.name: Enable / disable task
set_task_enabled.description: Toggle a schedule's enable flag without deleting it. For mowers this rewrites the plan with reserved[2] set; for Spino it sets the (inverted) enable field.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: True to enable the schedule, false to disable it.

delete_task.name: Delete task
delete_task.description: Permanently delete the schedule identified by the targeted task button entity.

copy_task.name: Copy task
copy_task.description: Duplicate a schedule under a new id. The new task name defaults to 'Copy-N' (next free slot) when omitted.

edit_task.name: Edit task
edit_task.description: Modify any subset of a schedule's fields. Unspecified fields keep their stored value (round-trip from the device). Mower-only and Spino-only fields are described per field.

weeks.name: Weekdays
weeks.description: List of weekday integers (0 = Sunday … 6 = Saturday) the schedule runs on.

trigger_type.name: Trigger type
trigger_type.description: 0 = weekly, 1 = day interval, 2 = date, 3 = run once.

day.name: Day interval
day.description: Interval in days when trigger_type is 1 (DAY).

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: Mower: driving speed (float). Spino: fixed32 speed value (int).

route_spacing.name: Route spacing
route_spacing.description: Mower-only: spacing between mow lines in cm.

zone_hashs.name: Zone hashes
zone_hashs.description: Mower-only: list of area hashes (fixed64) covered by this schedule.

work_mode.name: Work mode
work_mode.description: Spino-only: 0 = recharge, 1 = AUTO, 2 = FLOOR, 3 = WALL, 4 = ECO, 5 = LINE, 6 = CUSTOM.

sub_mode.name: Sub-modes
sub_mode.description: Spino-only: list of APP_WORK values for multi-stage cleaning.

starttime.name: Start timestamp
starttime.description: Spino-only: unix timestamp (seconds) for the start of the cleaning session.

create_task.name: Create task
create_task.description: Create a brand-new schedule on the targeted device. The integration auto-generates a fresh plan id / jobid. Fields are the union of mower and Spino schedule properties; the relevant subset is applied based on the device kind.

name.name: Name
name.description: Display name for the new schedule.

weeks.name: Weekdays
weeks.description: List of weekday integers (0 = Sunday … 6 = Saturday).

trigger_type.name: Trigger type
trigger_type.description: 0 = weekly, 1 = day interval, 2 = date, 3 = run once.

zone_hashs.name: Zone hashes
zone_hashs.description: Mower-only: list of area hashes covered.

refresh_tasks.name: Refresh tasks
refresh_tasks.description: Re-fetch every schedule from the targeted device. Use after delete-all or to recover from a missed update.

start_task.name: Start task
start_task.description: Run a stored schedule immediately (also known as 'start schedule'). Mower-only — the Spino pool cleaner has no equivalent command, so targeting a Spino task entity raises an error.

task_not_found.message: Task {plan_id} could not be found on the device. Refresh the schedule and try again.

dock_failed.message: Failed to send the mower to the dock.

dock_cancel_failed.message: Failed to stop the mower returning to the dock.

command_failed.message: Failed to send command to the mower.

api_limit_exceeded.message: API rate limit has been exceeded.

cloud_setup_failed.message: Unable to connect to the Mammotion cloud. Check your network and try reloading the integration.

start_task_unsupported_on_spino.message: Starting a schedule on demand is not supported on the Spino pool cleaner — the device firmware has no execute-now command for stored plans.
